name: Alpenrose Wealth Advisory
brandVoice: Warm but formal. The trusted family advisor who explains complex macro in clear, confident terms without dumbing it down. Swiss precision meets personal rapport. Avoids jargon when a plain word works. Uses 'we' as in 'we at Alpenrose believe' — personal, not imperial.
audienceProfile: Affluent professionals and business owners with $2-20M portfolios. Sophisticated enough to follow macro analysis but not full-time investors. They want clear guidance framed around their personal financial goals.

ctaLibrary.text: To discuss how this analysis applies to your portfolio, schedule a consultation with your Alpenrose advisor.
Join our monthly Global Outlook webinar for a deeper dive into these themes.

brandPositioning: Your personal wealth advisory partner. We combine Swiss analytical rigour with a genuine understanding of what matters to you and your family's financial future.
companyBackground: Founded in 2019 in Zurich by former UBS private banking team
Boutique team of 28 advisors, each managing fewer than 40 client relationships
Named 'Best New Wealth Advisor' by Swiss Finance Review in 2023
Proprietary AlpenView macro scoring framework updated weekly
Client satisfaction rate of 97% in 2025 annual survey
Average client relationship tenure of 4.2 years despite launching only 6 years ago
